welcome.description: Ingest documents, run OCR, extract metadata with AI, and route files to your cloud storage — all in one seamless pipeline.
welcome.hint: Connect to your self-hosted or cloud DocuElevate server.
welcome.feature_ocr_desc: Convert scanned PDFs and images into fully searchable text automatically.
welcome.feature_ai_desc: AI classifies documents and pulls out key fields like dates, amounts, and subjects.
welcome.feature_cloud_desc: Route processed files to Dropbox, Google Drive, OneDrive, S3, Nextcloud, and more.

login.hint: Sign in via SSO or scan a QR code from the web app.
login.server_url_required_msg: Please enter the URL of your DocuElevate server.
login.invalid_url_msg: The server URL must start with http:// or https://

upload.camera_access_msg: Please grant camera access in Settings to capture documents.
upload.photo_access_msg: Please grant photo library access in Settings to select images.
upload.empty_title: Tap Camera, Photos, or Files to upload a document.
upload.empty_hint: You can also share files from other apps directly to DocuElevate.
upload.sign_in_required: Please sign in to upload documents.
upload.retry_msg: Do you want to retry uploading "{filename}"?

files.title: My Documents
files.empty_hint: Upload a document from the Upload tab to get started.

profile.title: Profile
profile.sign_out_msg: Are you sure you want to sign out?
profile.delete_account_msg: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
profile.could_not_open: Could not open the {page}. Please try again.
